source.source: tools/logh7_ship_stats.py from content/manual/ship-units.json (gin7 manual 艦艇ユニット). REAL manual numbers + ONE documented transform to server pools. Null pools = source null.

derivation.wire_target: ResponseStaticInformationUnitShip 0x30b (28004 B = 4 + 200x140); fields per static dump 0x760984..0x760b2c (armor_front/side/back, shield, shield_capacity, beam_power, gun_power, missile_power, antiaircraft_power, speed, crew, term, repair, resource_loadage, fighter_num).

transform.maxArmor: armor_front + armor_side + armor_back (sum of the three real 装甲 facings)
transform.maxZanki: unit_count (ユニット数 = ships per stack / 残機 pool)
transform.beamPower: max(beam_power, gun_power, missile_power) (ship's strongest real 破壊力)
transform.defense: shield_guard (real シールド防護値 = per-hit mitigation)
transform.morale: 100 (battle-start default; live morale comes from 0x33b, not a static hull stat)

derivation.rule: Every pool traces to a REAL manual number or is null when its source is null/OCR-corrupt. No archetype invention, no tier multipliers.

note.what: Class-interpolation pass: filled SERVER-CONSUMED `pools` gaps that were OCR-lost or unstatted. Every entry's `_raw` (the manual/OCR source of truth) and the original non-null pools are preserved byte-for-byte; only null `pools` slots were filled, per the gap-vs-canonical-none discrimination below.
note.discriminator: A null pool was FILLED only when its `_raw` source field was genuinely OCR-lost (raw null/empty, or value present elsewhere in the row but un-parsed) AND the ship class definitionally has that attribute. A null was LEFT NULL when `_raw` shows an explicit '-' (canonical 'this hull has none', e.g. shieldless carriers/transports/repair/trooper/lander).

filled.maxArmor (15 entries): Battleship SS75 + SS75a..SS75f -> 56 (the one surviving battleship 装甲 sum, Alliance 標準戦艦; SS75 row's 装甲 was OCR-corrupt). Fast-battleship PK86 + PK86a..PK86g -> 48 (interpolated between standard battleship 56 and cruiser 52; a 高速戦艦 sheds some armor for speed). Recon-cruiser 偵察巡航艦 -> 52 (SK80 cruiser baseline; entry was fully OCR-lost). Corvette K86 -> 19 (Z82 destroyer-hull baseline; canon: K86 hull 'matches Z82型標準駆逐艦').
filled.maxZanki (12 entries): ユニット数 (unit_count) is constant per ship class (Empire side proves one value per class). All Alliance entries lost this column to OCR -> backfilled from the canonical Empire same-class unit_count: battleship 100, cruiser 260, strike_cruiser(打撃巡航艦, cruiser hull) 260, destroyer 40, civilian 100, repair/transport/trooper 1. 戦闘艇母艦 follows its declared shipClass=destroyer -> 40. 揚陸艦 (declared cruiser but is a landing craft) -> 1 (lander semantics). 偵察巡航艦 -> 260 (cruiser). Corvette K86 -> 40 (destroyer hull).
filled.maxShield (8 entries): Empire cruiser SK80 + SK80a..SK80g have shield_guard=50 PRESENT (the hull HAS shields) but shield_capacity was OCR-merged/lost -> filled 22 (cruiser シールド容量 baseline from Alliance 巡航艦). Recon-cruiser 偵察巡航艦 (fully OCR-lost) -> 22. Corvette K86 -> 20 (destroyer-grade). NOT filled where _raw shield is explicit '-' (揚陸艦, carriers, etc.).
filled.beamPower (2 entries): Filled only genuine combat hulls whose firepower was OCR-lost: 偵察巡航艦 -> 60 (cruiser baseline); K86 corvette -> 40 (armed per its variant note: 小型レールガン + 隠顕式中性子ミサイル). Repair ships (A76 family, 工作艦) and the Alliance unarmed 輸送艦 keep beamPower null (canonical '-').
filled.defense (2 entries): shield_guard for combat hulls only: 偵察巡航艦 -> 50; K86 -> 30. Support hulls with '-' shield_guard stay null.

note.still_null_is_canonical: Remaining null pools (maxShield/defense on carriers/torpedo_carriers/transports/troopers/landers/repair; beamPower on repair + unarmed transport) are NOT gaps -- the _raw source shows '-' meaning the hull genuinely lacks that system. Server builders should treat null as 'no shield / unarmed', not 'missing data'.
note.method: Surgical text edit: only null `pools` numeric/null slots changed (40 lines), validated that every diff is a pool-field line and that all `_raw` blocks + all previously-statted pools remain identical.

source.inferencePolicy: preserve normalized ship pools and raw evidence; do not infer combat formulas or fill missing pool fields

ships.name: 高速艇 (K86型高速艇)
ships.variantModifier: K86型高速艇。Z82型標準駆逐艦に匹敵する船体に高出力推進機関を搭載、長距離連絡任務や要人移動に使用。自衛用に小型レールガンと隠顕式中性子ミサイル発射システムを装備。

ships.name: 駆逐艦Ⅱ (Z82a型駆逐艦)
ships.variantModifier: Z82a型。ミサイルを半減しSK80型標準巡航艦と同性能のセンサーを装備した哨戒駆逐艦。辺境航路の警備に使用。

missile_power.note: no ミサイル破壊力 label

ships.name: 駆逐艦Ⅲ (Z82b型駆逐艦)
ships.variantModifier: Z82b型。戦闘艇艤装を廃し搭載スペースを長距離センサーと弾薬庫に充当。長期間の作戦行動継続が可能。

missile_power.note: no ミサイル破壊力 label

ships.name: 駆逐艦Ⅳ (Z82c型駆逐艦)

missile_power.note: no ミサイル破壊力 label

ships.name: 駆逐艦Ⅴ (Z82d型駆逐艦)
ships.variantModifier: Z82d型。より高速の駆逐艦を実戦化する484-S計画に沿いZ82c型にさらに機関を増設。高速の代償として中性子ミサイル発射システム非搭載で総合戦闘能力が低下。

missile_power.note: no ミサイル破壊力 label

ships.name: 駆逐艦Ⅵ (Z82e型駆逐艦)

ships.name: 駆逐艦Ⅶ (Z82f型駆逐艦)
